pages.text: $(bold)All enchantments start at level one.$() You raise them by $(#7A2FBF)using$() the enchanted item.$(br2)"Usage" means any action that would normally reduce durability: $(li)mining $(li)attacking $(li)taking damage (for armor)

Every point of durability damage adds progress to $(italic)each$() enchantment on the item. When an enchantment's progress bar fills up, it $(#7A2FBF)levels up by one$() - with a sound and a burst of particles - and the bar resets, until it is maxed out.$(br2)Higher-tier items (more max durability) need a bit more progress per level.

pages.title: Progress Bars
pages.text: Hold $(#7A2FBF)Left Ctrl$() (configurable) to reveal a progress bar for every enchantment in an item's tooltip.

$(italic)Notes$()$(br)$(li)Single-level enchantments don't show a progress bar.$(li)Items without durability currently can't level up.$(li)Client options (progress display, key hint, bar width) live in the mod's config.
